creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you attach that shar as a patch? it seems that whatever you used to 
create the pr put it inline, and not as a patch. A FreeBSD committer, 
who needs to work on this can't easily extract it.  And, if they try to 
'copy/paste', they will lose the difference between whitespace and tabs.

(if you used send-pr, you should use the -a {port.shar} option.)

if you want to send an attachment to this pr as an update, see what 
command line tools you have that can do a valid MIME type attachment.
if using an email client, send the attachment to 
bug-followup@FreeBSD.org  and use the exact subject line below:

Re: ports/166802: new port: devel/swig, new version of devel/swig13



-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
 >*| * SECNAP Network Security Corporation
d: +1.561.948.2259
w: http://people.freebsd.org/~scheidell
